publicationStmt.p: Transcribed from Bodleian Library, Lovelace Byron collection, Box 165, folios 207-208. Transcription by Lisa Gold (2022). TEI conversion for Sextant pipeline, 2026.

div.p: Dearest W--. I am most wonderfully better today owing entirely to Dr Locock's wisdom & kindness. He is putting me quite on a new system & assures me that all my vagaries are purely physical. He is a great comfort to
me; & I feel convinced that all will come right in time.
Dear W--; are you not glad & pleased with Avis?--
I am going down this afternoon to see the Hen & Elizabeth; so I am hurried, & Hester will add more to you.
Think of my vexation yesterday at F. K's calling to tell

Dearest W-- Since Hester's & my letter were written, unforseen circumstances have entirely altered my plans for tomorrow; & I do not go to Esher. I write this in case you had thought to ride over & meet me.
